env_manager.name: Environment Variables
env_manager.description: Manage system and user environment variables with path validation

folder_size.name: Folder Size
folder_size.description: Scan and analyze folder sizes to find space-consuming directories

instructions.title: Usage Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Click the Browse button or manually enter the folder path to analyze. Supports disk roots and subdirectories.
instructions.step2_desc: Click the Start Analysis button. The program will recursively scan all subdirectories and files with real-time progress.
instructions.step3_desc: After scanning, view results in table view or treemap visualization. Supports sorting by size.
instructions.step4_desc: Double-click a folder to navigate into it for further analysis. Click Go Up to return to parent directory.

tips.title: Tips
tips.warning_msg: Delete operations cannot be undone. Please verify in Explorer first.
tips.double_click: Double-click folders to enter, files to open
tips.cache_hint: Results are cached automatically, no need to rescan

folder_size.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
folder_size.ready_desc: Select a folder above to analyze disk usage

json_format.name: JSON Formatter
json_format.description: Beautify, minify, and validate JSON data

unit_converter.name: Unit Converter
unit_converter.description: Common conversions for currency, length, weight, temperature, and base

instructions.step1_desc: Choose the unit category you want to convert (currency, length, weight, etc.)
instructions.step2_desc: Select source and target units from the dropdown lists on both sides
instructions.step3_desc: Input the value you want to convert in the left input field
instructions.step4_desc: The conversion result will appear automatically on the right, click copy icon to copy

base64_encoder.name: Encoder/Decoder
base64_encoder.description: Multi-format encoder/decoder: Base64, URL, Hex, HTML, Unicode, Binary, JWT, Punycode, Morse
base64_encoder.desc_base64: Convert text to Base64 encoding, commonly used for data transmission and storage
base64_encoder.desc_url: URL encoding/decoding for special characters in web addresses
base64_encoder.desc_hex: Hexadecimal encoding, convert text to base-16 representation
base64_encoder.desc_html: HTML entity encoding to prevent XSS attacks, escape special characters (<, >, &, etc.)
base64_encoder.desc_unicode: Unicode escape encoding (\uXXXX format), commonly used in JSON and JavaScript
base64_encoder.desc_binary: Binary encoding, convert text to 8-bit binary string
base64_encoder.desc_jwt: Parse JWT Token to view Header, Payload and Signature (decode only)
base64_encoder.desc_punycode: Internationalized domain name encoding, convert Unicode domains to ASCII-compatible format (encode only)
base64_encoder.desc_morse: Morse code encoding/decoding, supports letters, numbers and spaces

image_converter.description: Convert between common image formats (JPG/PNG/WEBP/SVG/ICO). Supports drag-and-drop, custom resolution and batch conversion.

translator.google_key_desc: Leave empty to use free interface. Provide a Key for more stable service.

translator.youdao_key_desc: Youdao translation requires Application ID and Application Secret.

settings.name: Settings
settings.description: Configure global parameters, API keys, and app preferences
settings.close_to_tray_desc: Minimize to system tray instead of exiting
settings.silent_start_desc: Start in background when launched at system startup
settings.export_desc: Export all current settings to a file, supports encryption
settings.import_desc: Restore settings from a backup file
settings.run_as_admin_desc: If checked, the app will request admin privileges on next startup.
settings.clipboard_monitoring_desc: Automatically record clipboard history, supporting text and images.
settings.global_shortcut_desc: Set a shortcut to quickly open the app and navigate to favorites

variable_naming.name: AI Variable Naming
variable_naming.description: Use AI to generate standard names for your variables, functions, and classes
variable_naming.input_placeholder: Enter Chinese name or requirement description, e.g., get user info, login status...
variable_naming.ai_config_error: Please configure AI API Key in settings first
variable_naming.ai_model_error: Please configure AI Model or Endpoint ID in settings first

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Set up your AI API Key and model in settings. Supports DeepSeek, Doubao, OpenAI, and more
instructions.step2_desc: Choose target programming language based on your project, or use general mode for various styles
instructions.step3_desc: Describe the variable's purpose in Chinese or English, e.g., user login status, get article list
instructions.step4_desc: AI will generate multiple naming styles for you to choose from. Click to copy to clipboard

color_picker.name: Color Picker
color_picker.description: Screen color picker, conversion and palette

node_cleaner.name: Node Manager
node_cleaner.description: Manage Node.js versions (NVM) and project dependencies (node_modules)

deps.title: Dependency Management Guide
deps.step1_desc: Click the path field and select a root directory containing multiple Node.js projects
deps.step2_desc: Click 'Scan' button to recursively find all node_modules folders
deps.step3_desc: Check the node_modules directories you want to delete, or use 'Select All'
deps.step4_desc: After deletion, you can reinstall dependencies using npm, pnpm, or yarn

nvm.title: Version Management Guide
nvm.step1_desc: Ensure NVM-Windows is installed for managing multiple Node.js versions
nvm.step2_desc: Click 'Refresh List' to see all installed Node.js versions
nvm.step4_desc: Click 'Use' in the version list to quickly switch to that version

vite.title: Create Vite Project
vite.step1_desc: Choose target framework from dropdown (React, Vue, Svelte, etc.)
vite.step2_desc: Pick the appropriate variant for your framework (TypeScript or JavaScript)
vite.step3_desc: Enter project name and target directory, optionally add extra arguments
vite.step4_desc: Click 'Create Project' button to generate and initialize your Vite project

node_cleaner.status_ready: Select a directory and click Scan
node_cleaner.ready_desc: Select a root directory to scan, we will find and clean node_modules for you
node_cleaner.confirm_msg: About to delete {{count}} node_modules directories. This action cannot be undone! Are you sure?

nvm.error_nvm_not_found: NVM not detected, please ensure NVM-Windows is installed

vite.status_ready: Select a directory and click Create Project
vite.path_placeholder: Select target directory for project creation...
vite.extra_args_tip: Interactive prompts will be auto-answered with 'y'. Add --help to see more options

dns_tool.name: DNS Helper
dns_tool.description: Flush DNS cache or quickly switch to public DNS
dns_tool.admin_required: Administrator privileges are required to modify DNS settings

clipboard_manager.name: Clipboard History
clipboard_manager.description: Record clipboard history, support text search and image preview
clipboard_manager.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history?

hash_calculator.name: Find Duplicates
hash_calculator.description: Scan folders to find duplicate files and show their size
hash_calculator.empty_state: Please click the button above to select a folder

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Click 'Select Folder' to choose a directory to scan
instructions.step2_desc: The system will recursively scan all files in the folder and calculate hashes to identify duplicates
instructions.step3_desc: Click the copy button to copy file paths to clipboard for batch processing
instructions.step4_desc: Click 'Clear' button to remove all results and start over

batch_renamer.name: Batch Rename
batch_renamer.description: Powerful batch file/folder renaming tool with regex and sequence support

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Click 'Add Files' or 'Add Folders' to select files or folders to rename. Multiple selection is supported.
instructions.step2_desc: Set prefix, suffix or use regex for find-replace in the renaming rules section. Advanced variables like counter, random string and datetime are supported.
instructions.step3_desc: The system will show the rename effect in real-time. Carefully check the preview to ensure it meets your expectations.
instructions.step4_desc: Click 'Execute Rename' after confirmation. All operations are saved to history and can be reverted with one click.

batch_renamer.sequence_step_hint: Tip: No numbering if step is 0

tips.title: Tips
tips.warning_msg: Renaming is irreversible. Please check the preview carefully.
tips.range_select: Hold Shift + Click to select range
tips.select_all: Press Ctrl + A to select all

errors.HISTORY_NOT_FOUND: No history found for this file

variables.title: Advanced Variables
variables.hint_enumerate: Use ${start=1;increment=1;padding=4} in 'Replace with' to insert counter
variables.hint_random: Use ${rstringalnum=8} for random string, ${ruuidv4} for UUID
variables.hint_datetime: Use $YYYY$MM$DD for file creation date, $hh$mm$ss for time

basic.title: Simple match examples
basic.any_text: Matches any text in the name
basic.example_test_bar: Matches text starting with 'test' and ending with 'bar'
basic.example_until_bar: Matches as much as needed until 'bar' appears

variables.title: Capture groups & variable examples
variables.cond_append: Only append '.txt' when filename has no extension
variables.reorder_date: Use capture groups to reorder date format; e.g. 29-03-2020 → 2020-03-29 (${1} = 1st group, ${2} = 2nd group, etc.)
variables.insert_at_n: Insert 'test' at position n from start/end
variables.truncate: Truncate n characters from start or end

variable_picker.title: Insert Variable
variable_picker.counter_desc: Add incremental numbering to files with customizable start, increment, and zero-padding. Ideal for batch file numbering and serialized naming.
variable_picker.start_value_desc: The starting number for the counter (e.g., 0, 1, 100)
variable_picker.increment_desc: The increment value for each file (e.g., 1 for sequential, 2 for skipping)
variable_picker.padding_desc: Minimum number of digits, padded with zeros (e.g., 3 digits will display as 001, 002)
variable_picker.simple_counter_desc: Use default settings, starting from 0 with sequential increment
variable_picker.custom_counter_desc: Use the configured start value, increment, and padding above
variable_picker.random_desc: Generate random strings for creating unique file identifiers. Each file will get a different random value, ensuring filename uniqueness.
variable_picker.string_length_desc: Set the length of the random string (1-32 characters)
variable_picker.alphanumeric_desc: Generate random strings with uppercase, lowercase letters and numbers, suitable for general use
variable_picker.alphabetic_desc: Generate random strings with only uppercase and lowercase letters, avoiding numeric confusion
variable_picker.numeric_desc: Generate purely numeric random strings, suitable for scenarios requiring numeric identifiers
variable_picker.uuid_desc: Generate globally unique identifiers (36 characters), suitable for scenarios requiring strict uniqueness
variable_picker.datetime_desc: Use current system date and time as part of the filename. All files will use the same timestamp (the time of renaming).
variable_picker.year_short_desc: Display last two digits of the year, e.g., 24
variable_picker.year_single_desc: Display last digit of the year, e.g., 4
variable_picker.month_full_desc: Display full English month name, e.g., December
variable_picker.month_short_desc: Display abbreviated English month name, e.g., Dec
variable_picker.month_padded_desc: Display two-digit month number, padded with zero, e.g., 01-12
variable_picker.month_number_desc: Display month number without padding, e.g., 1-12
variable_picker.weekday_full_desc: Display full English weekday name, e.g., Wednesday
variable_picker.weekday_short_desc: Display abbreviated English weekday name, e.g., Wed
variable_picker.day_padded_desc: Display two-digit day number, padded with zero, e.g., 01-31
variable_picker.day_number_desc: Display day number without padding, e.g., 1-31
variable_picker.hour_padded_desc: Display two-digit hour, padded with zero, e.g., 00-23
variable_picker.hour_number_desc: Display hour number without padding, e.g., 0-23
variable_picker.minute_padded_desc: Display two-digit minute, padded with zero, e.g., 00-59
variable_picker.minute_number_desc: Display minute number without padding, e.g., 0-59
variable_picker.second_padded_desc: Display two-digit second, padded with zero, e.g., 00-59
variable_picker.second_number_desc: Display second number without padding, e.g., 0-59
variable_picker.ms_two_desc: Display first two digits of milliseconds, e.g., 00-99
variable_picker.ms_one_desc: Display first digit of milliseconds, e.g., 0-9
variable_picker.date_basic_desc: Compact date format without separators, e.g., 20241225
variable_picker.datetime_full_desc: Complete date and time combination, e.g., 20241225_143022

cron_generator.description: Visually generate and parse Cron expressions with next run time preview

ip_lookup.description: Query IP address information including location, ISP, and organization

clicker.name: Clicker
clicker.description: Simulate automatic mouse clicks and keyboard key presses
clicker.step1_desc: Select between mouse clicking or keyboard key pressing modes
clicker.step2_desc: Set the interval, mouse button or keyboard key
clicker.step3_desc: Click the Start button to activate the auto-clicking service
clicker.step4_desc: Stop the service quickly via button or hotkey (F8/F9)
clicker.no_macros: No macros configured, click below to add
clicker.delay_helper: Delay between each character when typing text
clicker.hotkey_switch_on: Enabled · F8 controls mouse, F9 controls keyboard
clicker.hotkey_switch_off: Disabled · Enable to use F8/F9 as global shortcuts for clicker

simple_web_server.name: Simple Web Server
simple_web_server.description: Start a local HTTP server to quickly share files and static websites
simple_web_server.no_folder_selected: Please select a server directory first
simple_web_server.port_in_use: Port is already in use, please select another port
simple_web_server.access_denied: Access denied, cannot access this folder
simple_web_server.auto_start_tooltip: Automatically start server on app launch

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Click the 'Browse' button to select the folder you want to share. All files in this folder will be shared
instructions.step2_desc: Enter a server port number (recommended 8080-8090). Valid port range is 1024-65535
instructions.step3_desc: Click 'Start Server' button to start the server on the specified port
instructions.step4_desc: Use the local or network address to open in browser, or share the address with other devices

tips.local_access_desc: Local address (127.0.0.1) can only be accessed from this machine, useful for quick local testing
tips.network_access_desc: Network address can be used on other devices in the local network. Ensure both devices are on the same network
tips.port_hint_desc: Avoid using system ports like 80, 443. If you encounter a 'port in use' error, try another port number

design_philosophy.title: Design Philosophy
design_philosophy.content: The design philosophy of this page is to facilitate file transfer over the LAN, or to easily start a lightweight web server for local HTML deployment testing without using Nginx.

port_scanner.name: Port Scanner
port_scanner.description: Quickly scan open ports on a target host with custom port ranges and concurrency settings
port_scanner.target_host_placeholder: Enter IP or domain (e.g., 192.168.1.1 or google.com)
port_scanner.custom_ports_placeholder: Enter ports separated by comma or space (e.g., 80, 443, 8080)
port_scanner.invalid_host: Please enter a valid host address
port_scanner.invalid_custom_ports: Invalid port format, please check input
port_scanner.start_port_greater_than_end: Start port cannot be greater than end port

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Enter the target host to scan. It can be an IP address (e.g. 192.168.1.1) or a domain name (e.g. google.com)
instructions.step2_desc: Choose a scan mode: Common Ports (fast), Port Range (custom), or Custom Port List
instructions.step3_desc: Set timeout duration and concurrency. Shorter timeout makes scanning faster, higher concurrency makes scanning faster but uses more resources
instructions.step4_desc: Click 'Start Scan' button to begin scanning. You can click 'Stop Scan' at any time to interrupt the scan

pip_player.name: Bilibili Slacking Player
pip_player.video_url_placeholder: Paste Bilibili video link (BV/av/short link supported)
pip_player.login_window_opened: Login window opened, please scan QR code
pip_player.scan_login_prompt: Please scan QR code in the login window to login
pip_player.no_login_found: Login information not found, please ensure you have completed the login

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_title: (Optional) Login to Bilibili by QR Code
instructions.step1_desc: Click 'Scan to Login' button to login with your Bilibili account to unlock all features and access your collections
instructions.step2_desc: Paste the Bilibili video link into the input field. Supports BV code, av code, and short links (b23.tv). Can select from history
instructions.step3_desc: Set window size and position. Check 'Auto enable Bilibili PIP mode' for better experience
instructions.step4_desc: Click 'Play' button to start playing video in a floating window. You can switch videos or stop playback anytime

bilibili_login.login_success: Login successful! Window will close soon...
bilibili_login.scan_qr_code: Please scan QR code to login to Bilibili

weread_book.description: Browse WeRead web version within the app, perfect for reading
weread_book.title: WeRead Book

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.step1_desc: Choose from preset sizes (Phone, Tablet, Desktop, etc.) or enter custom width and height in pixels
instructions.step2_desc: Click 'Open WeRead' button to open the WeRead web version in a window with the specified size
instructions.step3_desc: Enjoy all WeRead features in the opened window. You can still freely adjust the window size after opening

othello.title: Othello
othello.description: Classic strategy board game, supports local and online multiplayer
othello.ai_no_moves: AI has no valid moves, skipping
othello.mode_online_desc: Create or join a room to play online
othello.rules_desc: Players take turns placing disks. If you flank opponent's disks with yours, they flip to your color. Player with most disks wins.

game2048.description: Classic numbers puzzle game, slide tiles to reach 2048

instructions.title: How to Play
instructions.step1_desc: Use arrow keys (↑ ↓ ← →) or swipe to move the tiles
instructions.step2_desc: When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one
instructions.step3_desc: After each move, a new tile (2 or 4) appears in a random empty spot
instructions.step4_desc: Merge tiles until you reach 2048 to win, but if the board is full and no moves are possible, you lose

bazi_chart.name: Bazi Chart
bazi_chart.description: Four Pillars of Destiny calculator with elemental analysis
bazi_chart.analysis_hint: This analysis is based on the Five Elements relationships of the Four Pillars, for entertainment purposes only. A complete analysis requires considering major cycles, annual cycles, and other factors.
bazi_chart.ai_hint: AI will provide a detailed reading based on your birth chart (requires AI provider API key in Settings)

about.title: About ToolDock
about.description: ToolDock is a Windows utility toolbox built with Tauri, providing rich features including file management, system monitoring, network tools, and development assistance. It adopts modern technology stack with focus on native experience, type safety, and modular design.

features.native: Native Performance - Built with Rust + Tauri for fast startup and low resource usage
features.type_safe: Type Safety - Full TypeScript support with consistent types across frontend and backend
features.modular: Modular Architecture - Clear directory structure, easy to extend and maintain
features.i18n: Internationalization - Built-in Chinese/English switching, easily extensible to more languages
features.theme: Theme Switching - Supports light/dark themes with automatic system adaptation

deps.tauri_desc: Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop applications with Rust
deps.react_desc: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces
deps.mui_desc: Popular React UI framework with rich components
deps.ts_desc: A superset of JavaScript that adds static type checking
deps.vite_desc: Next generation frontend build tool with blazing fast development experience
